response.justification: Candidate is a solid mid-to-senior full-stack developer with broad language exposure and some recent touchpoints with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq), but the profile falls far short of a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. There is no evidence of 15 years at the required seniority, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built, no advanced degree in AI, and no track record advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Community contributions: talks, workshops, and open-source GIS platform
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products/platforms
Lacks Principal/Director-level scope — no strategy, advisory, or org-wide influence experience
Cloud experience is limited (some AWS CDK); no deep cloud platform or infra leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience across stacks
